denominator_used: N = 48 paired samples (samples with both methylation beta values and RNA-seq expression data, matched by Tumor_ID)
assumptions_made: HES1 promoter defined as UCSC_RefGene_Group in {TSS200, TSS1500, 5'UTR (5URT), 1stExon}; Per-sample promoter methylation = mean beta across the 24 HES1 promoter CpGs present in the beta matrix; RNA matrix column names are Tumor_IDs and can be directly matched with methylation sample columns; HES1 expression = HES1 row of the log-normalized RNA-seq matrix (logCPM-like values)
step_by_step_analysis:
A. DATA LOADED
- EPIC manifest (GPL21145): 868,565 probes with UCSC_RefGene_Name and UCSC_RefGene_Group annotations
- GSE207207 beta values: probes x 108 samples
- GSE207400 RNA-seq log-normalized matrix: 14,995 genes x 48 samples
- MOESM4 Clinical Data: 108 samples with RNA label / Tumor_ID

B. COHORT DEFINITION
- Samples must have both methylation (108 samples with Tumor_ID column labels) and RNA-seq data (48 samples with Tumor_ID column labels)
- The 48 RNA columns (M803, M1014, ... NF3175) are a subset of the 108 methylation Tumor_ID columns
- Final N = 48 paired samples

C. VARIABLE CODING
- HES1 promoter CpGs: probes where UCSC_RefGene_Name == 'HES1' and UCSC_RefGene_Group is in {TSS200, TSS1500, 5'UTR (spelled 5URT in EPIC manifest), 1stExon}
- 25 HES1 promoter CpGs found in the manifest (21 TSS1500, 4 TSS200, 1 1stExon, 3 with 5URT;1stExon composite)
- 24 of those 25 CpGs present in the GSE207207 beta values matrix
- Per-sample promoter methylation = mean of beta values across the 24 CpGs
- Gene expression = HES1 row of log-normalized RNA-seq matrix (logCPM-like)

D. COMPUTATION
- scipy.stats.pearsonr(mean_beta, HES1_logCPM) on N=48 paired samples

E. RESULT
- Pearson r = -0.3363
- p-value = 1.9422e-02
- N = 48
- Mean beta range: 0.042 - 0.074
- HES1 logCPM range: 2.13 - 6.18

F. CAVEATS
- Average beta across HES1 promoter CpGs is a standard summarization; the paper may have used a specific subset (e.g., TSS200 only or a single CpG) which could change r and p.
- RNA matrix is log-normalized (authors' processing); exact normalization (logCPM, TMM, VST) not verified.
- One HES1 promoter CpG in the manifest was not present in the beta matrix (probably dropped in QC).
- 'RNA label' field in clinical metadata is inconsistent with RNA column headers, but the RNA matrix column names themselves match Tumor_IDs directly, so a direct join was used.
